_comment: EVAL-01 seed generation cases. Hand-authored until production harvest (/review + mark-final) lands. Each `accepted_output` is grounded in `evidence_bank` + `job` and must pass the deterministic hard-fact gate; `forbidden_facts` are the adversarial channel — facts the output must never assert. `negative_output` is a deliberately ungrounded draft the gate MUST flag.

job.title: Director Agentic AI
job.description: Lead agentic AI for drug development using LangGraph and AWS.

evidence_bank.claim_text: Built LangGraph multi-agent platforms on AWS for enterprise AI.
evidence_bank.source_span: Built LangGraph multi-agent platforms on AWS

evidence_bank.claim_text: Led a team of 8 engineers delivering ML systems.

cases.accepted_output: Engineering leader who built LangGraph multi-agent platforms on AWS and led a team of 8 engineers delivering ML systems.
cases.negative_output: Engineering leader who built LangGraph platforms on AWS, led a team of 8, and increased revenue 40% at Google.

job.title: Staff ML Engineer
job.description: Build fraud detection ML at scale on GCP.

evidence_bank.claim_text: Shipped a fraud detection model on GCP serving 5 million users.
evidence_bank.source_span: fraud detection model on GCP serving 5 million users

evidence_bank.claim_text: Owned MLOps pipelines with automated retraining.

cases.accepted_output: I shipped a fraud detection model on GCP serving 5 million users and owned MLOps pipelines with automated retraining, which maps directly to Monzo's fraud detection work.
cases.negative_output: I shipped a fraud detection model on AWS serving 10 million users at Stripe.

evidence_bank.claim_text: Reduced payment processing latency by 30 percent.
evidence_bank.source_span: Reduced payment processing latency by 30 percent

cases.accepted_output: My most relevant impact was reducing payment processing latency by 30 percent.
cases.negative_output: My most relevant impact was reducing payment latency by 50 percent at Adyen.
